channel.title: Comments on: 2009…Here We Come!
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Screwtop
item.dc:creator: Screwtop
item.description:
Paul,
From a wine drinker, let me tell you that your sight has helped bring me over to the "dark side". The "dark beer" side that is!! Your episodes are informative, and I'll be on the lookout for some of that Clipper City (although my wife seems to think "Arrogant Bastard" is more my style). Keep it up!
Chris
item.content:encoded:
Paul,

From a wine drinker, let me tell you that your sight has helped bring me over to the “dark side”. The “dark beer” side that is!! Your episodes are informative, and I’ll be on the lookout for some of that Clipper City (although my wife seems to think “Arrogant Bastard” is more my style). Keep it up!

Chris

item.title: By: The Beer Wench
item.dc:creator: The Beer Wench
item.description:
Paul,
Cheers to you and your beer adventures! I absolutely love what you are doing ... combining the art of craft beer with multiple social media platforms. Your episodes have been very entertaining and informative, thus far. I look forward to viewing many more in the coming year! Perhaps one day I will take a road trip up to Atlanta and join you boys for an episode? Eventually, I would also like to add video to my blog and may turn to you and your crew for advice (if you be so inclined).
Thanks for making a strong beer impact on the social media world! Cheers!
Ashley
item.content:encoded:
Paul,

Cheers to you and your beer adventures! I absolutely love what you are doing … combining the art of craft beer with multiple social media platforms. Your episodes have been very entertaining and informative, thus far. I look forward to viewing many more in the coming year! Perhaps one day I will take a road trip up to Atlanta and join you boys for an episode? Eventually, I would also like to add video to my blog and may turn to you and your crew for advice (if you be so inclined).

Thanks for making a strong beer impact on the social media world! Cheers!

Ashley
